nodes.label: AI as literature discovery tool
nodes.grounding_span: it can synthesise information so quickly and serve as a great diving board into various sources

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and figure creation
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to look silly by having some sort of silly mistake in the figure where the data is misrepresented

nodes.label: AI as thought partner for logic checking
nodes.grounding_span: having it write the whole thing makes me feel like I am no longer the one steering the conclusions drawn from my research

nodes.label: AI as endless revision suggester
nodes.grounding_span: it makes it sort of like a hedonic treadmill of fixing things and then fixing more things

nodes.label: AI practicality of experimental designs
nodes.grounding_span: having an ethics bot that double checks experiment designs against general guidelines

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.grounding_span: having a dedicated frame work of models with slightly different system instructions for each step within the research process

nodes.label: Efficient literature processing
nodes.grounding_span: it can synthesise information so quickly and serve as a great diving board into various sources

nodes.label: Research integrity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to look silly by having some sort of silly mistake in the figure where the data is misrepresented

nodes.label: Personal intellectual ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I am no longer the one steering the conclusions drawn from my research

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity in writing
nodes.grounding_span: having one or two checking steps and then having the AI affirm that everything looks good

nodes.label: Ethical research conduct
nodes.grounding_span: double checks experiment designs against general guidelines and highlights grey areas

nodes.label: Seamless workflow integration
nodes.grounding_span: help provide nice punctuation between steps of the research process

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI for literature search
nodes.grounding_span: I think having AI as a partner when it comes to this type of literary search is really quite helpful

nodes.label: Hesitation toward AI for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to look silly by having some sort of silly mistake in the figure where the data is misrepresented

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: having it write the whole thing makes me feel like I am no longer the one steering the conclusions drawn from my research

nodes.label: Frustration with AI making unintended changes
nodes.grounding_span: it makes it sort of like a hedonic treadmill of fixing things and then fixing more things

nodes.label: Concern about AI's ethical risks
nodes.grounding_span: having an ethics bot that double checks experiment designs against general guidelines

nodes.label: Desire for specialized AI models per research phase
nodes.grounding_span: having a dedicated frame work of models with slightly different system instructions for each step within the research process

nodes.label: Iterative exploration with verification — uses AI for broad search then double-checks sources
nodes.grounding_span: I would not let it do the entire literary search for me without me double checking sources

nodes.label: Domain-based compartmentalization of AI use
